model_diagnosis.omnivoice_decoder: parallel iterative masked-token decoder, not autoregressive
model_diagnosis.primary_source: SoulX content/F0 mismatch on long repeated lyrics with large score jumps
model_diagnosis.secondary_source: Korean-trained waveform refiners on high or large-jump Japanese phrases
model_diagnosis.openutau_phoneme_limit: DefaultPhonemizer passes note lyrics as aliases; the runtime split remains inferred

changes: RC9-only score-timed semantic chunks for five-or-more exact Japanese repetitions lasting at least six seconds with large jumps
phrase-local Japanese readings and physically voiced/unvoiced F0 masking only on the verified five-repeat repair
waveform refiner bypass only for Japanese phrases at or above MIDI 80 or with 12-semitone jumps
rejected_changes: autoregressive repetition penalty: incompatible with the actual OmniVoice decoder
short rapid phrase chunking: reduced lyric retention
four-repeat long phrase chunking: reduced a previously correct phrase from 1.0 to 0.375 ASR similarity
SoulX 32/50/64-step and CFG 1.5/2.0 sweep: did not fix the ending refrain
OmniVoice 32/64-step and guidance 2.0/2.5/3.0 sweep: did not restore the omitted repetition
remaining_defect: The short ending refrain is unchanged; decoder and source-parameter sweeps did not fix it.
